channel.title: close encounters — noteworthy alerts
channel.description: Threshold-rule alerts: sizeable objects inside the lunar distance, very-close approaches, late-warning new objects. Append-only — corrections are emitted as new alerts.

item.title: Alert (short_arc_late_warning): 2026 KM3 — 2026-06-09
item.description: new object with 2-day observation arc; first close approach in 10 days

item.title: Alert (short_arc_late_warning): 2026 KT2 — 2026-05-28
item.description: new object with 1-day observation arc; first close approach in 1 days

item.description: new object with 7-day observation arc; first close approach in 3 days

item.description: new object with 1-day observation arc; first close approach in 0 days
